zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Burnell於大約1258年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可米德萊頓時，她的父親Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells21歲，母親Juliana23歲。她於1278年與Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales在英國諾福爾可米德萊頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1333年7月26日之前在英國諾福爾可米德萊頓，埋葬在英國諾福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Burnell于大约1258年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可米德萊頓时，她的父亲Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells21岁，母亲Juliana23岁。她于1278年与Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales在英国諾福爾可米德萊頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1333年7月26日之前在英国諾福爾可米德萊頓，埋葬在英国諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Burnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Burnel, a metathesized form of Old French Brunel, originally a nickname for someone with brown hair or complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Burnell was born about 1258, in Middleton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells, was 21 and her mother, Juliana, was 23. She married Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales in 1278, in Middleton, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died before 26 July 1333, in Middleton, Norfolk, England, and was buried in Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Burnell est née environ 1258, à Middleton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Juliana, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales en 1278, à Middleton, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 26 juillet 1333, à Middleton, Norfolk, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Burnell um 1258 in Middleton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells 21 und ihre Mutter Juliana 23. Sie hat 1278 in Middleton, Norfolk, England Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 26. Juli 1333 in Middleton, Norfolk, England und wurde in Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Burnell è nata il circa 1258 nel Middleton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Juliana, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales nel 1278, nel Middleton, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 26 luglio 1333, nel Middleton, Norfolk, England, e fu sepolta a Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Burnellが約1258年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクミッドレトンで生まれた時，父Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wellsは21歳，母Julianaは23歳であった。1278年にイギリスノーフォルクミッドレトンでRobert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scalesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1333年7月26日以前にイギリスノーフォルクミッドレトンで死去し，イギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Burnell(이)가 대략 1258년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 미들레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juliana(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1278년 영국 노르폴크 미들레턴에서 Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1333년 7월 26일 이전 영국 노르폴크 미들레턴에서 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Burnell nasceu aproximadamente 1258, em Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Juliana, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales em 1278, em Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 26 de julho de 1333, em Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Burnell родилась около 1258 г. в местности миддлетон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Juliana, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales в 1278 г. в местности миддлетон, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 26 июля 1333 г. в местности миддлетон, норфолк, Англия и была похоронена в местности норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Burnell nació aproximadamente 1258, en Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Burnell Bishop of Bath and Wells, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Juliana, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Robert de Scales IV 1st Baron de Scales en 1278, en Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 26 de julio de 1333, en Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Norfolk, Inglaterra.
